## Issue Type

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Incorrect citation
- [ ] Missing resource
- [ ] Wrong categorization
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Duplicate entry
- [ ] Other

## Resource Details

- **Title:** [Title of the affected resource]
- **Author(s):** [Author names, if known]
- **Section/Category:** [e.g., MEAL, Gender, Climate, Public Health]
- **Current URL (if applicable):** [URL that is broken or incorrect]

## Description

Provide details about the content issue.

## Suggested Fix

If you know the correct information, please provide it here (e.g., updated URL, correct citation, proper category).

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the content issue here.
